meta-llama/llama-3.1-405b-instruct.notes: Very strong reasoning and coding model with excellent long-context performance. Higher latency and cost make it suitable only when additional reasoning quality is expected to provide meaningful value.

meta-llama/llama-3.1-70b-instruct.notes: Balanced open-weight model with strong reasoning and coding. Good quality-to-cost ratio for many technical tasks.

meta-llama/llama-3.1-8b-instruct.notes: Fast and inexpensive model suitable for lightweight conversations, summarization, rewriting and simple coding.

openai/gpt-4o.notes: Excellent across nearly every capability. Premium model that should only be selected when higher quality meaningfully outweighs additional cost.

openai/gpt-4o-mini.notes: High value model delivering strong quality at low cost. Excellent default choice when premium reasoning is unnecessary.

anthropic/claude-3.5-sonnet.notes: Outstanding coding and reasoning model. Particularly strong for large repositories, debugging and architecture discussions.

anthropic/claude-3-haiku.notes: Fast and economical model suitable for everyday chat, summarization and lightweight development tasks.

google/gemini-2.0-flash-exp.notes: Efficient multimodal model with good reasoning, long-context support and strong overall value.
